data.title: Expensify to Announce Q2 2026 Results
data.description: Expensify, Inc. will be reporting its Q2 2026 financial results post-market on August 6th, 2026. The company (Nasdaq: EXFY) offers a user-friendly platform for managing expenses, corporate cards, and travel. An earnings call to discuss the results is scheduled for the same day at 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Those interested can access the call via a link on Expensify's Investor Relations website at investors.expensify.com.

data.title: i2c Appoints Chief Financial Officer and Chief Client Officer to Accelerate Next Phase of Global Growth
data.description: i2c Inc., a leading financial technology company based in Redwood City, California, has recently named Joseph Schmidt as their new Chief Financial Officer and Jason Goldberg as the Chief Client Officer. These appointments are part of the company's efforts to fortify its executive team while expanding operations globally. With the goal of enhancing its technological advancements and client relationships, i2c aims to drive growth in the future under Schmidt's leadership in the finance sector and Goldberg's expertise in client services.

data.title: Trulioo Launches AI Agent to Resolve Beneficial Ownership Where Global Registries Fall Short
data.description: In San Diego, Trulioo, a worldwide risk intelligence platform, introduced the UBO Discovery Agent as the latest component of its UBO Discovery feature integrated into its business risk and Know Your Business (KYB) verification process. Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming fraud, enabling perpetrators to conceal their activities more effectively, posing challenges for companies in detecting them. This advancement amplifies the complexity in confirming the true owners of a business. Identifying the ultimate beneficial owner of a business has become increasingly challenging due to these technological advancements.

data.title: Ropedia Raises $30 Million to Scale Data Infrastructure for Physical AI
data.description: A startup based in Singapore, Ropedia, revealed that it recently secured a substantial amount of funding, totaling US$30 million in pre-A funding. The investment came from a group of venture investors well-versed in AI, enterprise technology, and infrastructure in Southeast Asia. Alongside these investors, long-term financial investors and strategic partners in robotics, mobility, and enterprise deployment also participated in the funding. This injection of funds will be instrumental in expanding Ropedia's data infrastructure designed for physical AI.

data.title: WATT Fuel Cell Closes Equity Financing to Accelerate Commercial Growth
data.description: In Mount Pleasant, Pennsylvania, WATT Fuel Cell, a company specializing in advanced solid oxide fuel cell systems, has recently completed a new equity financing round. This funding round, which saw participation from both current and new investors, will give WATT additional capital for team expansion, boosting production capacity, and progressing customer deployments. Notably, this includes their agreement with Hope Gas for residential fuel cell systems under the brand WATT HOME™. This injection of funds is crucial for WATT's growth and operational initiatives.

data.title: $15M pledged by Strategy-led group to secure Bitcoin network from quantum computing threat.
data.description: A group headed by Strategy and BlackRock has committed $15 million to safeguard the Bitcoin network against potential risks posed by advancements in quantum computing.
ECB's President Lagarde: We're providing framework guidance

data.title: BLP Strengthens Presence in Seattle Market with Acquisition of 782,775-Square-Foot Class A Distribution Facility Fully Leased to Harbor Freight Tools
data.description: A company known as BLP has recently completed the acquisition of a significant industrial facility in the Pacific Northwest. This facility spans an impressive 782,775 square feet and is considered a prominent asset. It is currently fully leased on a long-term basis to a national credit tenant. The facility's strategic location near the Port of Tacoma adds to its appeal and value.

data.title: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc., Publishes Sixth Annual Sustainability Report
data.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc., based in Tustin, California, has published its latest Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2025. This marks the sixth annual report from the company. Sabra (Nasdaq: SBRA) emphasizes its commitment to sustainability by showcasing the integration of successful pilot technologies across its portfolio and implementing initiatives that enhance care delivery. The report also underscores Sabra's investments in resilient and efficient operations. These efforts align with the company's overall sustainability strategy, demonstrating its ongoing dedication to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles.

data.title: ManageWare Solutions Signals a New Era for Workers' Compensation Technology with Appointment of Industry Leader Bryan Hunziker as Chief Growth Officer
data.description: In MESA, Arizona, a recent development in the workers' compensation industry highlights a shift away from traditional technology limitations. In the past, systems for claims, utilization review, case management, bill review, provider networks, document management, and clinical review operated independently. This resulted in separate platforms, workflows, and integrations. However, a new connected ecosystem is emerging that aims to streamline processes. This move signifies a departure from the previous fragmented approach, bringing together various aspects of the industry for enhanced efficiency.

data.title: One Click, One Attacker-Controlled Agentic Insider: Zenity Labs Uncovers ‘AgentForger,’ a ChatGPT Vulnerability
data.description: Zenity Labs has revealed a significant vulnerability named AgentForger affecting OpenAI’s ChatGPT Workspace Agents at the AI Agent Security Summit in New York. This security flaw has far-reaching implications for users of the platform, potentially exposing them to risks associated with unauthorized access and information breaches. The disclosure underscores the importance of robust security measures in AI technologies, with the vulnerability posing a threat to the integrity of data and privacy. The exact impact of AgentForger on users remains unclear, but it serves as a stark reminder of the ongoing challenges in safeguarding digital environments. Users of OpenAI’s ChatGPT Workspace Agents should remain vigilant and monitor updates and patches from the platform to mitigate the risks associated with AgentForger.
China issues security reminder to citizens in Saudi Arabia.

data.title: DISCO Appoints Andre Mintz to Board of Directors
data.description: In Austin, Texas, DISCO, a prominent provider of litigation technology listed on NYSE under LAW, shared news of the appointment of Andre Mintz to its Board of Directors on July 21, 2026. Mintz, a seasoned information security executive with prior roles at Meta and experience as a board member for public companies, brings a substantial amount of expertise to DISCO. Scott Hill, the Chairman of the Board, praised Mintz's extensive data security background gained from working in complex risk environments globally.

data.title: Elio Raises $21M to Build Sensing for the AI Era
data.description: A technology company in Silicon Valley, California, Elio, introduced a new funding round of $21 million. The investment was spearheaded by Innovation Endeavors and Xora, along with contributions from Kevin Weil and Scribble VC. Prior backers UpWest and Resolute Ventures, who spearheaded the company's previous funding round, are also part of this round. Elio specializes in developing sensors specifically for artificial intelligence applications, diverging from traditional sensors designed for human vision. These sensors are tailored to capture a predetermined view of the environment, aligned with what is perceptible to the human eye.
